calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Apr-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Phuc Dinh Do for Duc Van Luu, Petitioner (via Zoom).

The court acknowledged procedural issues that had been properly addressed by counsel. The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant as prayed.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Dinh Do Phuc appeared via zoom for Duc Van Luu (petitioner).

The Court stated that there were several procedural problems, and that a proposed order was never submitted. Mr. Phuc requested a brief continuance to remedy the issues. The matter is continued to April 07, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.
